question.title: PR-A4b multi-step driver + Executor output_ref wiring + integration — plan v1 adversarial review (iter 1)
question.body:
PR-A4b is the second half of the FAZ-A Tranche A PR-A4 split (CNS-20260415-023 approved `split_2_pr`). A4a already landed (main HEAD 9368e97): contract repair (state_machine +2 edges, step_record.attempt, step_def.operation enum + conditional allOf, evidence 18-kind, bundled workflow operations), ao_kernel.patch primitives (preview/apply/rollback with atomic revdiff + dirty-state cleanup + patch_id narrow regex), ao_kernel.ci primitives (python3 -m pytest/ruff under SandboxedEnvironment + fail-closed CIResult status), registry StepDefinition.operation parser + cross-ref guards. A4b builds MultiStepDriver on top + wires Executor.run_step output_ref + 30+ integration tests.

8 spec-level questions (plan §10):

Q1 Driver authoritative state under retry append-only: if run_record.state is already `failed` at resume entry (prior CAS wrote terminal on wrong path), surface DriverStateInconsistencyError or retry silently?
Q2 CAS conflict retry bound: fixed 1 retry or configurable max_retries kwarg?
Q3 adapter_returned payload field naming: output_ref + output_sha256 + attempt vs alternative namespacing (artifact_sha256 to avoid event envelope payload_hash collision)?
Q4 context_compile stub behaviour: silent no-op StepResult with empty preamble OR emit warning evidence?
Q5 ci_mypy in schema but no runner (A4a iter-4 W2): reject with _StepFailed(unsupported_operation), add run_mypy, or remove from enum?
Q6 Resume workflow payload hash: approval payload = {decision, notes} dict hashed OR decision-only (PR-A1 primitive scope)?
Q7 Cross-ref double-check (workflow-level + per-step): cache + skip-per-step flag or preserve per-step no-cache invariant?
Q8 PR-A4b single-PR scope recheck: split further (Executor output_ref wiring separate vs driver) or single A4b?

A4b scope (plan §1-§3): ~2100 LOC / ≥30 new tests / target 1477+ total.

Invariants (A3 + A4a preserved + A4b new):
- 1-19 from A4a (POSIX-only, PATH anchoring, per-run events.jsonl.lock + seq, cross-ref per-call, canonical event order, JSONPath subset, text/plain triple gate, patch preflight flag-aligned, reverse diff deterministic, rollback idempotent via write-tree SHA, CI flaky=0, retry append-only no running→running, multi-step state CAS, HITL resume idempotent, escalate_to_human, output_ref durable, dirty-state cleanup, primitive-scoped preflight)
- 20 NEW: Driver authoritative state via (step_name, highest_attempt); run stays `running` while retry available
- 21 NEW: Resume position derives from run_record.steps[] terminal completed entries; no schema current_step_index
- 22 NEW: adapter_returned.payload.attempt explicit + payload.output_sha256 (distinct from event envelope payload_hash)
- 23 NEW: Budget gating between steps only; record_spend inside Executor/primitives; wall-clock+subprocess+HITL all on time_seconds axis
- 24 NEW: Cross-ref workflow-level once at driver entry + per-step Executor preserved; mismatch → early workflow_failed no step_started

Context refs: .claude/plans/PR-A4b-IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md (v1), .claude/plans/PR-A4-IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md (A4a shipped), .ao/consultations/responses/CNS-20260415-023.iter2.codex.response.v1.json (A4a post-fix review), ao_kernel/executor/executor.py, ao_kernel/executor/adapter_invoker.py, ao_kernel/workflow/registry.py (A4a updated), ao_kernel/workflow/run_store.py, ao_kernel/workflow/primitives.py, ao_kernel/workflow/state_machine.py (A4a updated), ao_kernel/patch/, ao_kernel/ci/, ao_kernel/defaults/schemas/workflow-{run,definition}.schema.v1.json (A4a updated), ao_kernel/defaults/workflows/bug_fix_flow.v1.json, docs/EVIDENCE-TIMELINE.md, docs/DEMO-SCRIPT.md, CLAUDE.md.

Expected: PARTIAL iter-1 with blocker + warning absorb (CNS-019..023 pattern). Fresh MCP thread (A4a thread 019d928f-978f-7ac2-91cb-b0f286798cbd closed at A4a merge).
